name: Iron Constitution
flavourText: Years of punishment have conditioned the body to endure blows that would stop another sorcerer.

name: Miracle Reservoir
flavourText: The technique quietly removes the tiny coincidences that once made life feel impossible, keeping them beyond memory until they are needed.
mechanicText: At the start of battle, gain 6 MIRACLES. MIRACLES can avert fatal damage, and you can store up to 6.

name: Fateful Reprieve
flavourText: At the instant fate closes in, a forgotten coincidence returns and turns an ending aside.
mechanicText: When damage would reduce you to 0 HP or below, expend 1 MIRACLE to negate that damage.

name: Fortune Reclaimed
flavourText: A near miss or a perfectly timed strike leaves another small impossibility behind to be collected.
mechanicText: Whenever an enemy attack naturally misses you or you land a BLACK FLASH, gain 1 MIRACLE, up to 6.
